'''âr-f-p-l''' ('''karafpeloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:beachcomb|beachcomb]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-f-p-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beachcomb|beachcomb]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-f-p-l
|-
! Lemma
| karafpeloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirafpeloko|thirafpeloko]] || [[word:jirafpeloko|jirafpeloko]] || [[word:shirafpeloko|shirafpeloko]] || [[word:kirafpeloko|kirafpeloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurafpeloko|thuthurafpeloko]] || [[word:jujurafpeloko|jujurafpeloko]] || [[word:shushurafpeloko|shushurafpeloko]] || [[word:kukurafpeloko|kukurafpeloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurafpeloko|thurafpeloko]] || [[word:jurafpeloko|jurafpeloko]] || [[word:shurafpeloko|shurafpeloko]] || [[word:kurafpeloko|kurafpeloko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorafpeloko|thorafpeloko]] || [[word:jorafpeloko|jorafpeloko]] || [[word:shorafpeloko|shorafpeloko]] || [[word:korafpeloko|korafpeloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠrafpeloko|thĂŠrafpeloko]] || [[word:jĂŠrafpeloko|jĂŠrafpeloko]] || [[word:shĂŠrafpeloko|shĂŠrafpeloko]] || [[word:kĂŠrafpeloko|kĂŠrafpeloko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharafpeloko|tharafpeloko]] || [[word:jarafpeloko|jarafpeloko]] || [[word:sharafpeloko|sharafpeloko]] || [[word:karafpeloko|karafpeloko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
